creator: mark@ukug.uk.freebsd.org
text:
Add content for the empty section "What about backups to floppies?"
	in the handbook.

Fix: Apply the following diffs.

	I have also changed the order of the sections in this chapter because

	9. Backups 
		9.1. Tape Media 
		9.2. Backup Programs 
		9.3. What about backups to floppies? 

	seems more logical than

	9. Backups 
		9.1. What about backups to floppies? 
		9.2. Tape Media 
		9.3. Backup Programs 

How-To-Repeat: 
	Read chapter of the handbook.
